metadata.purpose: Normalized backend data package for a future private family travel webpage/portal.
metadata.data_quality_note: Prices, offers, award availability, and booking rules are volatile and must be refreshed before booking. Ambiguous names are flagged. v0.2 includes user-provided screenshots and official URLs, but booking prices/offers remain volatile and require live refresh before booking.
metadata.preferred_cabin: Business class when feasible, especially for longer vacations.
metadata.last_update_summary: Updated with user-provided official URLs, corrected Phangan Beach Resort to Thailand, added health-related program note registration status, Caesars Atlantis screenshot-confirmed Platinum offer details, extended family, and profile form schema.

family_profiles.name: Stephen King
notes: Veteran note omitted; consider military/eligible public discounts where applicable, private accessibility/travel notes omitted from public build, low-stress logistics.

family_profiles.name: Selma Ward
notes: Space-A cannot be assumed usable with Stephen because they are relationship eligibility details private.

family_profiles.name: Ashly King
notes: Private accessibility profile omitted; prioritize low-stress logistics, accessibility, health-related proximity, family-friendly lodging.

family_profiles.name: David King
notes: Support multi-origin planning from Bay Area airports.

family_profiles.name: Elaire Ward
notes: Support multi-origin planning from South Carolina airports.

notes: Support multi-origin planning from Kansas City area airports if joining group trips.

notes: Support international multi-origin planning from Belgium/Europe; may affect destination choice and family meetup routing.

family_profiles.name: Quintin King
notes: Support international multi-origin planning from Belgium/Europe; may affect destination choice and family meetup routing.

family_profiles.name: Adelaide King
notes: Support international multi-origin planning from Belgium/Europe; may affect destination choice and family meetup routing.
Atlantis Bahamas offer and Caesars Rewards Air are major value levers.
Lower offer value currently.
Relevant to Hilton Aruba and future Hilton stays.
Relevant to Alaia Belize, Nha Trang Marriott, Royalton/Autograph properties.
Relevant to Miraval, Grand Hyatt Deer Valley, Hyatt Inclusive Collection/Bahia/Sunscape.
Compare direct AA pricing with oneworld/partner award options.
Compare Delta direct with Flying Blue/Virgin/Korean/Aeromexico where relevant.
Compare United direct with Aeroplan/LifeMiles/Turkish/ANA/KrisFlyer.
Can book Delta reward tickets when Delta partner award space is available.

airline_partner_strategy.verified_basis: AA states AAdvantage miles can be earned/redeemed on oneworld partners and lists partners bookable through AA including Alaska, British Airways, Cathay, Fiji, Finnair, Iberia, JAL, Qantas, Qatar, Royal Air Maroc, Royal Jordanian, SriLankan and others.
Flying Blue says Delta reward tickets can be searched through Air France/KLM channels; Delta and Air France operate a global partnership.
Air Canada/Aeroplan and Avianca/LifeMiles support Star Alliance and partner redemption frameworks; Star Alliance provides broad global coverage.

travel_apps.name: Grab
travel_apps.use_case: Ride-hailing and delivery; verify foreign card setup.

travel_apps.name: Local Pay
travel_apps.use_case: Ambiguous name; verify exact app and foreigner access.

travel_apps.name: Zalo
travel_apps.use_case: Messaging/local communication with hotels, tours, drivers.

travel_apps.name: Xanh SM
travel_apps.use_case: Electric taxi/ride service; verify coverage in target cities.

destinations.name: Krause Springs
key_facts: Privately owned Texas Hill Country swimming hole and campground in Spicewood, Texas.
Official website lists daily hours of 9am to 8pm.
Official site has Pricing & Policies and RV Sites & Tent Camping sections; pricing should be refreshed before visit.
accessibility_notes: Likely uneven natural terrain; verify walking distances, stairs, handrails, parking distance, and water-entry difficulty before planning with mobility limitations.
planning_notes: Good Austin-area day trip/weekend candidate; verify crowding, weather, water conditions, and whether advance booking is required.

destinations.name: Longhorn Cavern State Park
key_facts: Park grounds entry is free; cave access is by paid guided tour.
Walking tour includes 52 stone steps and cave temperature around 68°F year-round.
Reservations highly recommended.

known_costs_or_rates.description: Walking tour off-peak M-Th adult starting price

accessibility_notes: 52 stone steps and cave walking may be difficult for mobility limitations.

destinations.name: The Meadows Center / Glass-Bottom Boat Tours
key_facts: Glass-bottom boat tours run daily; public tours start 30 minutes after opening and run until 30 minutes before closing.
Boats accommodate 20 adults; same-day passes first-come, first-served.
accessibility_notes: Likely lower physical strain than hiking/caving; confirm boarding accessibility.

destinations.name: Pedernales Falls State Park
key_facts: Open daily; office generally 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; gates closed 10 p.m.–8 a.m.
Reservations recommended because park often reaches capacity.
accessibility_notes: Trails/rocks/water areas may create fall or mobility risk.

destinations.name: Westcave Outdoor Discovery Center
key_facts: Reservations required; preserve visits by guided tour only.
Guided Canyon Tour is 1 mile round trip, moderate to difficult, 1.5–2 hours, max 25 people.
Canyon/cave/grotto access by guided tour only.
accessibility_notes: Moderate-to-difficult hike; likely not ideal for mobility limitations.

destinations.name: Blue Hills Ranch
key_facts: Safari-style ranch lodging and animal experiences; Giraffe Safari Villa is 4-bedroom/3.5-bath glass house.
Cabins commonly have 2-night minimums and sleep 2–6 depending on unit.

known_costs_or_rates.basis: per night for 2 people; rates vary

accessibility_notes: Animal experiences may require walking/standing; confirm activity-specific accessibility.

destinations.name: CaP's Crossing
key_facts: Located on the Guadalupe River in New Braunfels; offers tubing, cabins, RVs, tent camping.
Flower Cottages built in 2025 sleep 4 with A/C; tent sites include picnic table, fire pit, grill, 110 outlet.
accessibility_notes: River tubing may be unsuitable for mobility/health-related limitations; cottages may be easier.

destinations.name: Lake Livingston / Lighthouse on Lake Livingston - Cameron Ranch Glamping
key_facts: Cameron Ranch Glamping offers designer cabins and geo domes across Coldspring/Lake Livingston and Bastrop/Lake Bastrop.
The official property list includes Lighthouse on Lake Livingston with capacity for 10 guests, 4 beds, and 3 baths.
Other options include mirror houses, geo domes, cabins, and Bastrop/Lake Bastrop units.
accessibility_notes: Verify exact unit access, stairs, bedroom/bathroom layout, parking distance, and lakefront terrain before booking.
planning_notes: Strong extended-family or low-stress nature-stay candidate; also useful as a test case for the future family calendar and group-voting portal.

destinations.name: USCG Lake Tahoe A-Frames
key_facts: Coast Guard MWR operates recreational lodging; Lake Tahoe A-Frames are on Coast Guard base in Tahoe City.
Units include 1-bedroom and 2-bedroom cabins sleeping up to 6–8, with kitchens; some units are about 300 yards from the beach.
accessibility_notes: Some units are second-floor; choose first-floor/accessible options if needed.

destinations.name: Fort Tuthill Luke AFB Recreation Area
key_facts: US Air Force Recreation Area in Flagstaff with lodge rooms, cabins, A-frame lodges, yurts, RV/tent sites.
Open to DoD cardholders and sponsored guests; valid Military ID required.

known_costs_or_rates.basis: per night depending season/pet/unit from official rate page snippet

accessibility_notes: High elevation and winter conditions may affect comfort; verify accessible units.

destinations.name: Big Bear Recreation Facility - MCCS Miramar
key_facts: Facility has eight regular cabins and two ADA-compliant duplex cabins; max cabin occupancy six.
Offers cabins, RV sites, camping sites and local recreation.
accessibility_notes: ADA-compliant duplex cabins are key for accessibility; confirm availability early.

destinations.name: Grand Hyatt Deer Valley
key_facts: Opened November 20, 2024 as Grand Hyatt Deer Valley; 381 rooms/suites plus private residences per Ski Utah listing.
Daily resort fee listed by Hyatt as $40; Hyatt release said winter rates began at $799/night.

known_costs_or_rates.basis: daily per room; subject to change
secondary source; verify in Hyatt before booking

accessibility_notes: Ski/mountain destination; winter weather and resort layout may add mobility stress.

destinations.name: Navy Getaways Key West Vacation Rentals
key_facts: Vacation rentals at Trumbo Point include 3-bedroom/1.5-bath townhouses and 2-bedroom/1-bath cottages.
Same-day reservations by phone; max stay up to 14 days with 90-day departure period per DoD Lodging.
accessibility_notes: Confirm stairs/parking/accessibility for cottages/townhouses.

destinations.name: Hawaii Military Lodging Cluster
key_facts: Official Navy Region Hawaii lists Hale Koa (Waikiki), PMRF Beach Cottages (Kauai), Bellows AFS (Oahu), and Kilauea Military Camp (Big Island).
Kilauea Military Camp offers 90 one-, two-, and three-bedroom cottages/apartments near Hawaii Volcanoes National Park.
accessibility_notes: Long-haul flight stress; evaluate island-specific health-related access and mobility.

destinations.name: Alaska Military Lodging Cluster
key_facts: Coast Guard lodging list includes Alaska options such as Kodiak Guest House and Kodiak Nemetz RV Park.
Air Force Inns welcomes Active Duty, retirees, NAF/DoD civilians, and sponsored guests.
accessibility_notes: Long flights, weather, and remote health-related access require careful planning.

destinations.name: Atlantis Paradise Island - Caesars Rewards Platinum Offer
key_facts: User-provided Caesars Rewards screenshot shows Platinum tier Atlantis terms.
For February, August, November, and December: buy 2 nights at $150/night in Coral Tower and get 2 complimentary nights in Coral Tower, including room taxes.
For January, May, June, September, and October: complimentary 4-night stay in The Coral Tower, including room taxes.
For January, May, June, September, and October: up to 2 additional nights at a Special Casino Rate of $100 per night.
Screenshot instructs Platinum reservation through Atlantis Casino VIP Services at masked-number.

Offer appears to be one complimentary stay through the Atlantis partnership; must verify current eligibility, blackout dates, resort fees, taxes beyond room taxes, mandatory charges, and casino/rate rules before booking.

known_costs_or_rates.rate_detail: Buy 2 nights at $150/night in Coral Tower; receive 2 complimentary Coral Tower nights including room taxes.
4 complimentary nights in Coral Tower including room taxes, plus up to 2 additional nights at $100/night special casino rate.

accessibility_notes: Large resort; walking distances can be significant; request suitable room location.
planning_notes: Build dedicated 6-night AUS-NAS model including airfare, transfers, food, resort fees, taxes, casino budget, travel insurance.
For 6-night Austin-origin model, use Jan/May/Jun/Sep/Oct where 4 comped nights + 2 nights at $100/night applies.
Need live airfare model from AUS to NAS; check business/first cabin availability and whether cash fare, AA/Delta/United, or partner award is best.
Need full cost model: flights, airport transfers, food, Atlantis fees/charges, casino budget, activities, passport requirements, and health-related/accessibility comfort.

destinations.name: Caesars Rewards Air Charter Destinations
key_facts: Caesars Rewards Air lists destinations including New Orleans, Laughlin, Atlantic City, Biloxi, Lake Tahoe, and Reno.
Charters may depart from many cities and package inclusions vary by offer.
planning_notes: Track by destination, dates, cash co-pay, included hotel, freeplay/reward credits, and cancellation rules.

destinations.name: Hilton Aruba Caribbean Resort & Casino
key_facts: Set on 15 acres of white-sand Palm Beach and tropical gardens.
Amenities include casino, spa, two pools, beach, dining, free Wi-Fi, free parking, fitness center, and accessible amenities.
accessibility_notes: Confirm accessible room, beach/pool distances, and palapa reservation process.

destinations.name: Hotel Riu Santa Fe
key_facts: RIU describes Hotel Riu Santa Fe as 24-hour all-inclusive in Los Cabos with Renova Spa, Riu Pool Party, Splash Water World, RiuLand and more.
Located on/near El Médano beach; party energy may be higher than a quiet recovery trip.
accessibility_notes: Large/active resort; noise and party setting may not fit recovery goals.

destinations.name: Bahia Principe Riviera Maya Cluster
key_facts: Bahia Principe Explore Akumal/Tulum are Riviera Maya beachfront all-inclusive resort options.
Hyatt pages describe Bahia Principe Explore Akumal as family-friendly with spa, children's water park, and 15 restaurants.
accessibility_notes: Large resort complex; request room near elevators/main facilities if walking is a concern.
planning_notes: Exact property user meant by 'Bahia Ponc Ple Grand' needs confirmation.

destinations.name: Palmaïa - The House of AïA
key_facts: Property describes a one-rate all-inclusive system called The Gifting Lifestyle.
Wellness-focused luxury resort with oceanfront suites, plant-forward dining, and adults-only/family areas noted by Michelin.
accessibility_notes: Confirm walking distances and room location; may be better for Selma/Stephen than full family.

destinations.name: Grand Velas Riviera Maya
key_facts: Luxury all-inclusive with private beach, wellness spa, butler service, 8 restaurants, 4 bars, coffee shop, activities and entertainment.
Official newsroom calls it AAA Five Diamond, ultra-luxury all-inclusive on 206 acres with suites over 1,100 sq ft.
accessibility_notes: Large property; choose appropriate section/room for mobility and quiet.

destinations.name: Playa del Carmen All Inclusive Outlet Deal Placeholder
key_facts: All Inclusive Outlet lists Playa del Carmen vacation packages; snippet showed examples such as 4 nights with air from $699 but deal specifics change.
planning_notes: Use as deal-source record, not a single destination; attach screenshots and exact offer terms when found.

destinations.name: Sunscape Coco Punta Cana
key_facts: Hyatt Inclusive Collection describes Sunscape Coco Punta Cana as family-friendly with pools, beach days, activities, room service, and ocean views.
Third-party listing notes 14 restaurants and 6 outdoor pools; verify direct before booking.
accessibility_notes: Large resort; verify room location and beach accessibility.

destinations.name: Royalton Splash Punta Cana
key_facts: Royalton describes it as a family-friendly all-inclusive resort with water park, premium restaurants, casino, and spa.
Punta Cana International Airport is approximately 25 minutes from the resort; water park access is included for guests.
accessibility_notes: Water park has height restrictions; check walking distances to beach/resort amenities.

destinations.name: Alaia Belize, Autograph Collection
key_facts: Marriott page lists Alaia Belize in San Pedro, Ambergris Caye, with restaurant, bar, fitness center, spa, outdoor pool, beach, scuba/snorkeling and airport shuttle to SPR.
Alaia offers optional all-inclusive package add-on for reservations of 2 nights or longer.
accessibility_notes: Island transfer required; confirm boat/flight logistics and health-related access.

destinations.name: Cocobay Resort Antigua
key_facts: Official site describes Cocobay as an all-inclusive, adults-only beachfront getaway known as a romantic resort.
FAQ places it on 10 hillside acres overlooking Ffryes Bay, about 45 minutes from V.C. Bird International Airport.
accessibility_notes: Hillside property may mean stairs/slopes; confirm accessible cottages and transport around resort.

destinations.name: Sanctuary Cap Cana
key_facts: Official Marriott listing identifies Sanctuary Cap Cana as a Luxury Collection Resort, Dominican Republic, Adult All-Inclusive.
Adults-only resort in Cap Cana near Punta Cana International Airport; Marriott page states approximately 14 km / 15 minutes from PUJ.

Marriott FAQ states the nightly room rate typically includes room, meals, snacks, non-alcoholic and alcoholic beverages, entertainment, non-motorized water sports, taxes, service fees, and gratuities.
Marriott page notes the hotel does not provide shuttle service; airport transportation must be arranged separately.
accessibility_notes: Adults-only makes it unsuitable for trips with Ashly unless all travelers are adults and resort policy allows; verify accessibility, walking distances, elevators, and transportation.
planning_notes: Strong Selma/Stephen romantic all-inclusive candidate; compare against Palmaia, Grand Velas, BodyHoliday, Cocobay, and Atlantis.

destinations.name: Samsara Cliff Resort
key_facts: Official site identifies Samsara as a boutique hotel in Negril, Jamaica.
Official site describes an oceanfront boutique property overlooking Negril’s west coast and set amid five acres of tropical beauty.
accessibility_notes: Cliffside/oceanfront setting may include stairs, uneven terrain, and non-beach water access; verify accessibility carefully.
planning_notes: Potential romantic/boutique Jamaica candidate, but less obviously Ashly-friendly than flatter beach resorts or all-inclusives.

destinations.name: BodyHoliday St. Lucia
key_facts: Official site describes a generous all-inclusive wellness resort with daily spa treatment every full day, classes, adventure program and sports.
accessibility_notes: Wellness programming can be physically active; select low-impact itinerary.

destinations.name: Miraval Arizona Resort & Spa
key_facts: Miraval Package includes meals, unlimited fitness/yoga/meditation, and $175 nightly resort credit; Miraval is gratuity-free and inclusive.
World of Hyatt Miraval award nights include luxury accommodations, $175 nightly resort credit per person, meals/snacks/non-alcoholic beverages, and daily wellness activities.
accessibility_notes: Adults/wellness setting; confirm mobility-friendly activities and airport shuttle.

destinations.name: Miraval Austin Resort & Spa
key_facts: Miraval Austin is an inclusive destination resort and spa; guests must be 18+.
Includes nightly resort credit, rooms, all-day nourishment, daily wellbeing activities, spa access, shared shuttle from AUS, gratuities, arrival gift.
accessibility_notes: Very low travel stress from Kyle/Austin; adult-only policy and program style must fit travelers.

destinations.name: Mii amo Sedona
key_facts: Official site describes Mii amo as all-inclusive Journeys in Sedona; globally recognized destination spa/wellbeing resort.
Travel + Leisure says journeys can be 3, 4, 7, or 10 nights with meals, non-alcoholic drinks, daily credit, and fitness/workshop access.
accessibility_notes: Sedona terrain and property layout should be checked; high-touch service may be intense for some travelers.

destinations.name: The Ranch Malibu
key_facts: The Ranch is a structured luxury fitness/wellness retreat; third-party info describes daily hikes, yoga, fitness classes and intensive programming.
Tripadvisor describes it as highly structured, on 200 acres in the Santa Monica Mountains.
accessibility_notes: Likely physically demanding; may not fit current mobility limits without health-related clearance.

destinations.name: Nha Trang Marriott Resort & Spa, Hon Tre Island
key_facts: Marriott describes resort on Hon Tre Island reachable by boat or cable car; mainland pier is 15 minutes from Nha Trang city center and 40 minutes from Cam Ranh International Airport.
Rooms include 403 rooms/suites plus 2-,3-,4-bedroom villas with private plunge pools.
accessibility_notes: Long-haul travel, island transfer, and overseas health-related planning are key stress factors.

destinations.name: Phangan Beach Resort
key_facts: Corrected from initial Vietnam ambiguity: this is Phangan Beach Resort in Koh Phangan, Thailand, not Vietnam.
Official site lists address at 111/2 Moo 1, Ban Tai, Koh Phangan.
Official site describes a central location with a 200m private beach and sunset views.
Accommodation options include a Family Villa with 1 king bed and 2 single beds, listed for 4 guests.
accessibility_notes: Island logistics likely require multiple transfers; verify ferry/boat access, ground transfer, walking terrain, stairs, and health-related access before considering for Ashly or low-stress travel.
planning_notes: Move out of Vietnam candidate set into Thailand/Asia beach-resort list. Vietnam still has Nha Trang Marriott as the stronger current Vietnam resort candidate.

destinations.name: Las Flores Hotel & Wellness Center / Veterans Care International Punta Cana
key_facts: User is private health-related-program status omitted and is a private veteran/health-related status omitted.
Provider-response note omitted from public build.

health-related program note may cover health-relatedly necessary care abroad for VA-rated service-connected conditions, related/aggravating conditions, or VR&E-related care, but it is not a general vacation benefit.
VA states health-related program note does not have contract providers and does not issue preauthorizations; treatment-predetermination screening may provide reasonable assurance.
This opportunity must be validated with both Las Flores/VCI and health-related program note before any travel assumptions are made.
accessibility_notes: Health-related-care travel must be tied to service-connected care; confirm reimbursement/preauthorization/process directly with health-related program note and VCI.
planning_notes: Treat as health-related-wellness opportunity, not a free vacation. Verify legitimacy, covered services, lodging/meal costs, claim flow, and upfront payment requirements.

Once Las Flores responds, create a dedicated program record with eligibility, what is included, billing method, direct-billing capability, out-of-pocket exposure, lodging terms, health-related services, companion/family rules, and trip planning risks.

Ask Las Flores whether they file health-related program note claims directly, which VA-rated conditions they treat, whether they provide itemized English-language bills, expected costs, required health-related records, and whether companion lodging is included or separate.

priority_offers_to_load.offer_name: Atlantis Paradise Island Platinum 4-night comp + 2 extra nights
priority_offers_to_load.status: user-provided + secondary corroboration; verify in Caesars account

new_v0_2_notes: Create family profile form from profile_form_schema rather than hardcoding loyalty/traveler data.
Treat personally identifiable travel data as private; static public webpages should not store full passport numbers, KTN, DOB, or account numbers.
Add source_url, verification_status, and last_verified_date fields to destination cards.
Add multi-origin trip planning support for Sunnyvale CA, South Carolina, Holden MO, Belgium, Austin/Kyle TX, and future Biloxi MS.

profile_form_schema.purpose: Editable family-member profile form for future webpage.
profile_form_schema.privacy_note: Do not store passport numbers, Known Traveler Numbers, birthdates, or account numbers in public/static JSON. For the first private prototype, store only masked values or reminders unless secure login/encryption is added.
